subject: Re: flights
body:
new yoirk   ,,, then maybe wed or thurs to lsj

--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

> hello.. so, skyking doesn't have flights from Turks
> and Caicos to st.thomas. they have a flight to the
> Dominican Republic leaving T&C  at 12:30pm arriving
> DR at 1:20pm. I would then have to change to an
> American flight leaving at 2:20pm to San Juan
> arriving 3:57pm, then leave SJ at 5:10pm arriving
> STT at 5:49pm. The only thing I'm not sure is I
> would make the connection in the DR since it's
> technically "international travel" and with changing
> airlines, etc.
> The other option is I just fly back to NY tomorrow
> and catch the morning flight on Tues from NY to STT
> which leaves at 8am arrivng 12noon.. 
> what do you think?
>

body_html:
new yoirk ,,, then maybe wed or thurs to lsj

--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

hello.. so, skyking doesn't have flights from Turks
and Caicos to st.thomas. they have a flight to the
Dominican Republic leaving T&C at 12:30pm arriving
DR at 1:20pm. I would then have to change to an
American flight leaving at 2:20pm to San Juan
arriving 3:57pm, then leave SJ at 5:10pm arriving
STT at 5:49pm. The only thing I'm not sure is I
would make the connection in the DR since it's
technically "international travel" and with changing
airlines, etc.
The other option is I just fly back to NY tomorrow
and catch the morning flight on Tues from NY to STT
which leaves at 8am arrivng 12noon..
what do you think?
